content.query:
-- ************************************************************************************* --
-- parameter: [customer].[ext_inc_claims_LNR101_1000006_LNR101_3622901_ELS_All_2_append_t]    --
-- parameter: [customer].[ext_inc_mortality_LNR101_1000006_LNR101_3622901_ELS_All_2_appended_t] --
-- ************************************************************************************* --

-- 1. find patient age by token and dos_begin year from the incremental claims data
delete from appl.elsevier_inc_claims_age_by_year_t;
insert into appl.elsevier_inc_claims_age_by_year_t
(
	token
    , dos_year
    , patient_age
)
SELECT distinct 
    a.token
    , try_cast(a.dos_year as integer) as dos_year
    , try_cast(a.patient_age as integer) as patient_age
from
    (
        SELECT distinct token, substring(DOS_BEGIN, 1, 4) as dos_year, patient_age
        FROM [customer].[ext_inc_claims_LNR101_1000006_LNR101_3622901_ELS_All_2_append_t] a 
    ) a
where 
    a.dos_year is not null
    and a.dos_year <> ''
    and try_cast(a.dos_year as integer) is not null
    and a.patient_age is not null
    and a.patient_age <> ''
    and try_cast(a.patient_age as integer) is not null
;
go


-- 2. Find all minor tokens from the incremental claims data
delete from appl.elsevier_claims_minor_tokens_t;
insert into appl.elsevier_claims_minor_tokens_t (token)
select distinct token
FROM [appl].[elsevier_inc_claims_age_by_year_t]
where patient_age < 18;
go


-- 3. add new age by year to the existing ones, saved for future reference to correct patient ages
insert into appl.elsevier_claims_age_by_year_t 
(
	token
    , dos_year
    , patient_age
)
select
	s.token
    , s.dos_year
    , s.patient_age
from 
    appl.elsevier_inc_claims_age_by_year_t as s
WHERE 
    NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT token FROM appl.elsevier_claims_age_by_year_t a 
        WHERE a.token = s.token AND a.dos_year = s.dos_year and a.patient_age = s.patient_age
    );


-- 4. find the corrected age by token and dos_begin year
delete from appl.elsevier_claims_corrected_age_t;
insert into  appl.elsevier_claims_corrected_age_t
(
	token
  , dos_year
  , min_patient_age
  , diff_patient_age
  , cnt_patient_age
) 
select token, dos_year
  , min(case when patient_age > 85 then 85 when patient_age < 1 then 1 else patient_age end) as min_patient_age
  , max(case when patient_age > 85 then 85 when patient_age < 1 then 1 else patient_age end) - min(case when patient_age > 85 then 85 when patient_age < 1 then 1 else patient_age end) as diff_patient_age
  , count(distinct case when patient_age > 85 then 85 when patient_age < 1 then 1 else patient_age end) as cnt_patient_age
from 
    appl.elsevier_claims_age_by_year_t
group by 
    token, dos_year
having count(distinct case when patient_age > 85 then 85 when patient_age < 1 then 1 else patient_age end) = 2 
  and max(case when patient_age > 85 then 85 when patient_age < 1 then 1 else patient_age end) - min(case when patient_age > 85 then 85 when patient_age < 1 then 1 else patient_age end) = 1
;


-- 5. find all mortality tokens from the incremental mortality data
delete from [appl].[elsevier_inc_mortality_tokens_t];
insert into [appl].[elsevier_inc_mortality_tokens_t]
(input_token)
select distinct input_token
from customer.ext_inc_mortality_LNR101_1000006_LNR101_3622901_ELS_All_2_appended_t
where
    deceased_match_indicator = 'Y'
    and ((len(date_of_death) = 4 and cast(date_of_death as integer) between 2000 and 2024)
                or (len(date_of_death) >= 6 and cast(substring(date_of_death, 5, 2) as integer) between 1 and 12) and substring(date_of_death, 1, 6) between '200001' and '202412')
;


-- 6. add new mortality tokens to the existing ones, saved for future reference to redact claims
insert into [appl].[elsevier_mortality_tokens_t]
(input_token)
select
	s.input_token
from 
    appl.elsevier_inc_mortality_tokens_t as s
WHERE 
    NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT input_token FROM appl.elsevier_mortality_tokens_t a 
        WHERE a.input_token = s.input_token
    );


-- delete from [appl].[elsevier_mortality_tokens_t];
-- insert into [appl].[elsevier_mortality_tokens_t]
-- (input_token)
-- select distinct a.input_token
-- from 
--   [customer].[stg_incr_mortality_1_t] a
-- where
--     deceased_match_indicator = 'Y'
--     and ((len(date_of_death) = 4 and cast(date_of_death as integer) between 2022 and 2024)
--                 or (len(date_of_death) >= 6 and cast(substring(date_of_death, 5, 2) as integer) between 1 and 12) and substring(date_of_death, 1, 6) between '202201' and '202409')
-- ;
